title: HUP iEEG Epilepsy Dataset
description: A de-identified intracranial EEG dataset from 58 patients with drug-resistant epilepsy treated at the Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania. The dataset includes electrophysiologic recordings from subdural grids, strips, depth electrodes (ECoG), and stereotactically-placed depth electrodes (SEEG), with electrode localizations in ICBM152 MNI space, clinically-determined seizure onset zones, and resection/ablation cavity segmentations. Both interictal and ictal periods are represented, providing a comprehensive resource for epilepsy research and surgical outcome prediction.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG data were collected from patients undergoing surgical treatment for drug-resistant epilepsy using subdural grid, strip, and depth electrodes (ECoG) or stereotactically-placed depth electrodes (SEEG). Electrode localizations were determined in ICBM152 MNI space. The dataset was converted to BIDS format using MNE-BIDS.
